texts.desc:
You can only use this card name’s (1) effect once per turn.
(1) During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other monster from your hand or field, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon 1 monster that mentions “Dark Time Wizard” from your hand or Deck, except “Swift Panther Warrior”.
● Send 1 Spell/Trap that mentions “Dark Time Wizard” from your Deck to the GY.
(2) Cannot declare attacks unless a monster(s) was Tributed this turn.
texts.name: Swift Panther Warrior
